$comment: Source Priority registry for Thai Astrology Canon V1. Each entry registers a SOURCE IDENTITY and its tier only — it asserts no knowledge. Tier 0 (calculation engine) is frozen ground truth; Tier 1 (หลักมหาภูต) is the canonical interpretive source; Tiers 2-4 are supporting. canonical=true is permitted ONLY at tier1_canon.

sources.title: KnowMe Calculation Engine (Swiss Ephemeris + frozen matrices)
sources.notes: Computed astronomical facts: day/lagna/bhava/planet positions and the frozen PlanetRelationshipMatrix. Ground truth — the knowledge layer never asserts or overrides these. Registered for traceability only.

sources.title: หลักมหาภูต
sources.author: ส. หยกฟ้า
sources.notes: Canonical interpretive source for Thai astrology in KnowMe. When Canon speaks, Canon wins. Content not yet extracted — see mahabhut.manifest.json for the extraction architecture.

sources.title: พรหมชาติ (ตำราโหราศาสตร์ไทยดั้งเดิม)
sources.notes: Traditional Thai classical text — registered identity only. Supporting source: used to add detail/examples when Canon is silent, never to override Canon.

sources.title: KnowMe research & source corpus (knowledge/research, knowledge/sources)
sources.notes: Primary-source research collected via V3/V4/V7 (KnowledgeResearchRecord, EvidenceRecord, SourceRecord). Supporting tier.

sources.title: Internet / web material
sources.notes: Lowest-authority web material. Supporting only; must still carry a quote and reference.
